sub_goals.description: Build tests.html + tests.js harness; execute report

All edge_case_testing-tagged assertions covered: 21 assertion-equivalents (sections 1-6 acceptance assertions tagged edge_case_testing) + 4 section-7 assertions + 12 IP-level assertions = 37 verifications, all passing.
rationale: Coverage check confirms 100% of edge_case_testing-tagged assertions in sections-v1.json are exercised by tests.js.
